title: Python 多继承
content: 多继承： 子类有多个父类，继承父类方法 本文我们讨论多继承方法查找顺序 一般情况 自身有该方法，优先调用 12345678910111213141516class A(): def test(self): print('test A')class B(A): def test(self): print('test B')class C(A): def test(self): print('test C')class D(B,C): def test(self): print('test D')a=D()a.test()输出 test D 自身没有该方法，找自己的父类，谁在前，优先调用谁的该方法 123456789101112131415class A(): def test(self): print('test A')class B(A): def test(self): print('test B')class C(A): def test(self): print('test C')class D(B,C): passa=D()a.test()输出 test B 如果父类也没有该方法，调用父类的父类的该方法 12345678910111213class A(): def test(self): print('test A')class B(A): passclass C(A): passclass D(B,C): passa=D()a.test()输出 test A 父类的父类不止一个 如果父类的父类不止一个，深度优先找父类的父类的该方法 1234567891011121314151617class A(): def test(self): print('test A')class AA(): def test(self): print('test AA')class B(A): passclass C(AA): def test(self): print('test AA')class D(B,C): passa=D()a.test()输出 test A 父类的父类有共同的父类 但也不完全是深度优先，事实上是按照一种C3算法，如果父类的父类有共同的父类，并且也有该方法，下图可以见得，输出的是test AA，而不是test all_father 12345678910111213141516171819class all_father(): def test(self): print('test all_father') class A(all_father): passclass AA(all_father): def test(self): print('test AA')class B(A): passclass C(AA): def test(self): print('test AA')class D(B,C): passa=D()a.test()输出 test AA 总结 123456789101112131415161718192021class O(): def test(self): print('test O')class D(O): def test(self): print('test D')class E(): def test(self): print('test E')class F(O): passclass B(D,E): passclass C(F): passclass A(B,C): passa=A()a.test()输出 test D 1234567891011121314151617181920class O(): def test(self): print('test O')class D(O): passclass E(): def test(self): print('test E')class F(O): passclass B(D,E): passclass C(F): passclass A(B,C): passa=A()a.test()输出 test O

title: 直到我们再次相遇
content: Until we meet again 反转链表 哨兵节点 12345678910111213class Solution {public: ListNode* reverseList(ListNode* head) { ListNode *dummy=nullptr,*cur=head; while(cur!=nullptr){ ListNode *tmp=cur->next; cur->next=dummy; dummy=cur; cur=tmp; } return dummy; }}; 充分利用head 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445#include<iostream>using namespace std;struct ListNode { int val; ListNode* next; ListNode() : val(0), next(nullptr) {} ListNode(int x) : val(x), next(nullptr) {} ListNode(int x, ListNode* next) : val(x), next(next) {}};class Solution {public: ListNode* reverseList(ListNode* head) { if (head == nullptr) return nullptr; ListNode* cur = head; while (head->next != nullptr) { ListNode* tmp = head->next->next; head->next->next = cur; cur = head->next; head->next = tmp; } return cur; }};int main() { ListNode* firstNode = new ListNode(1); ListNode* secondNode = new ListNode(2); ListNode* thirdNode = new ListNode(3); ListNode* forthNode = new ListNode(4); ListNode* fifthNode = new ListNode(5); firstNode->next = secondNode; secondNode->next = thirdNode; thirdNode->next = forthNode; forthNode->next = fifthNode; Solution s; ListNode* head = s.reverseList(firstNode); while (head != nullptr) { cout << head->val << endl; head = head->next; }} 链表的中间结点 1234567891011class Solution {public: ListNode* middleNode(ListNode* head) { ListNode *slow=head,*fast=head; while(fast!=nullptr&&fast->next!=nullptr){ slow=slow->next; fast=fast->next->next; } return slow; }}; 环形链表 123456789101112class Solution {public: bool hasCycle(ListNode *head) { ListNode *slow=head,*fast=head; while(fast!=nullptr&&fast->next!=nullptr){ slow=slow->next; fast=fast->next->next; if(slow==fast) return true; } return false; }}; 环形链表II 快慢指针 让我们返回入口节点，看了众多题解，用双指针做，不知道其他人有木有这个疑问，在上一题能够成环的基础上，为什么就说相遇之后，我让fast指针从head开始出发，每次走一格与slow指针速度保持一致，最终就会在环的入口处相遇呢？还是推导比价靠谱，fast、slow分别表示快慢指针走过的距离，a表示入环前的距离，b+c表示环长，a+b表示slow指针走过的距离。 fast=2∗slowfast=2*slow fast=2∗slow fast=a+b+(b+c)∗nfast=a+b+(b+c)*n fast=a+b+(b+c)∗n slow=a+bslow=a+b slow=a+b a+b=(b+c)∗na+b=(b+c)*n a+b=(b+c)∗n a=(b+c)∗n−ba=(b+c)*n-b a=(b+c)∗n−b a=(b+c)∗(n−1)+ca=(b+c)*(n-1)+c a=(b+c)∗(n−1)+c 乍一看，可能没觉得什么，当我们给n赋值为1，那么a=c，以此类推，我们不难发现slow指针走了数圈一直默默地等待着fast指针，而a=(b+c)∗(n−1)+ca=(b+c)*(n-1)+ca=(b+c)∗(n−1)+c可以说明一切，他们一定会在入口处相遇。 12345678910111213141516171819class Solution {public: ListNode *detectCycle(ListNode *head) { ListNode *slow=head,*fast=head; while(fast!=nullptr&&fast->next!=nullptr){ slow=slow->next; fast=fast->next->next; if(slow==fast){ fast=head; while(fast!=slow){ fast=fast->next; slow=slow->next; } return slow; } } return nullptr; }}; HashSet 1234567891011121314class Solution {public: ListNode *detectCycle(ListNode *head) { unordered_set<ListNode *> visited; while(head!=nullptr){ if(visited.count(head)){ return head; } visited.insert(head); head=head->next; } return nullptr; }}; 再来一题！寻找重复数 C++好像也不存在空数组吧 12345678910111213141516171819class Solution {public: int findDuplicate(vector<int>& nums) { int slow=0; int fast=0; while(true){ slow=nums[slow]; fast=nums[nums[fast]]; if(slow==fast) break; } int ptr=0; while(ptr!=slow){ slow=nums[slow]; ptr=nums[ptr]; } return ptr; }};

title: 短板效应
content: 盛最多水的容器 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031#include<iostream>#include<vector>using namespace std;class Solution {public:	int maxArea(vector<int>& height) { int low = 0, high = height.size() - 1, res = 0; while (low < high) { int tmp = 0; if (height[low] < height[high]) { tmp = (high - low) * height[low]; low++; } else { tmp = (high - low) * height[high]; high--; } if (res < tmp) { res = tmp; } } return res;	}};int main() {	Solution s;	vector<int> height = { 1,8,6,2,5,4,8,3,7 };	cout<<s.maxArea(height);} 接雨水 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031#include<iostream>#include<vector>using namespace std;class Solution {public:	int trap(vector<int>& height) { int low = 0, high = height.size() - 1; int leftMax = 0, rightMax = 0; int res = 0; while (low < high) { leftMax = max(leftMax, height[low]); rightMax = max(rightMax, height[high]); if (leftMax < rightMax) { res += leftMax - height[low]; low++; } else { res += rightMax - height[high]; high--; } } return res;	}};int main() {	Solution s;	vector<int> height = { 0,1,0,2,1,0,1,3,2,1,2,1 };	cout<<s.trap(height);} 接雨水 II 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536373839404142434445464748495051525354555657585960616263646566#include<iostream>#include<vector>#include<queue>using namespace std;const int dx[] = { -1,0,1,0 };const int dy[] = { 0,1,0,-1 };class Solution {public:	struct Node { int x, y, h; Node(int xx, int yy, int hh) :x(xx), y(yy), h(hh) {}; bool operator<(const Node& node) const { return h > node.h; }	};	int trapRainWater(vector<vector<int>>& heightMap) { if (heightMap.empty() || heightMap[0].empty()) return 0; priority_queue<Node> minHeap; int rows = heightMap.size(); int cols = heightMap[0].size(); int res = 0; vector<vector<bool>>visited(rows, vector<bool>(cols)); for (int i = 0; i < cols; i++) { visited[0][i] = visited[rows - 1][i] = true; minHeap.push({ 0,i,heightMap[0][i] }); minHeap.push({ rows - 1,i,heightMap[rows - 1][i] }); } for (int j = 1; j < rows - 1; j++) { visited[j][0] = visited[j][cols - 1] = true; minHeap.push({ j,0,heightMap[j][0] }); minHeap.push({ j,cols - 1,heightMap[j][cols - 1] }); } while (!minHeap.empty()) { Node node = minHeap.top(); minHeap.pop(); int x = node.x; int y = node.y; int h = node.h; for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) { int nx = x + dx[i]; int ny = y + dy[i]; if (nx >= 0 && nx < rows && ny >= 0 && ny < cols && !visited[nx][ny]) { visited[nx][ny] = true; int height = max(heightMap[nx][ny], node.h); minHeap.push({ nx,ny,height }); if (heightMap[nx][ny] < node.h) { res += node.h - heightMap[nx][ny]; } } } } return res;	}};int main() {	Solution s;	vector<vector<int>> height = { {3,3,3,3,3} ,{3,2,2,2,3},{3,2,1,2,3},{3,2,2,2,3},{3,3,3,3,3} };	cout<<s.trapRainWater(height);}

title: 关于
content: 如果宇宙中真有什么终极的逻辑，那就是我们终有一天会在舰桥上重逢，直到生命终结。Stellar 主题是我见过最美的主题。很高兴能在2022年结束以前找到这样的一个接近完美而又适合我的主题，感谢开发者 xaoxuu。友链关于留言本地音乐 如果有任何疑问，请联系我的 邮箱 或提交 issue 向我询问。
